meta.scope: Incremental small-batch audit for 2026 Numata Bench Press roster Lots 20-22
repositoryGuardrails: Checked open PRs before editing; no open PRs were found.
Preserved v5.9.6_LOCK A4 print layout; no layout, CSS, rendering, or print-template files touched.
No achievements inferred from name-only matches.
Current-event rows are recorded in this audit log only and not promoted as prior histories.
meta.sourcePolicy: Official/high-trust sources first: HPA, JPA, IPF/Goodlift, APF/AAPF, official result PDFs. Confirmed histories require source-linked identity confidence. Ambiguous findings remain candidates.
